sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54005" key="kataqew/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταθεώρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n54005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">observation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:139:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">139.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
